---
name: deploy-checklist
description: Walks through the release checklist for this service. Use when the user asks to deploy, release, or ship a new version to production.
---

# Deploy checklist

1. Run `npm run test`.
2. Use the template in `templates/announcement.md` (bundled with this skill).
3. Update the user's `requirements.txt` if the project has one.
4. Tag the release.
